subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — it's great to hear from you, and the potential synergy you've described sounds genuinely interesting.

I'd be happy to set up an introductory call. Here are a few slots that work on our end:

  • Tuesday, 21 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 22 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 23 April 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let me know which of these works best for you and I'll get a calendar invite sent over.

Regarding the request for our internal contact directory and direct lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share internal contact details externally. If it would be helpful to involve additional stakeholders on our side, I'm happy to facilitate introductions through the appropriate channels once we've had our initial conversation.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
